permissions.description: Finding 7 / T-20-01: scoped to the EXACT buy host (https://tinkerdev.io/*), never https://* or *, so the openUrl seam cannot become an open-redirect. This permits BUY_LICENSE_URL=https://tinkerdev.io/buy (UpsellPanel.tsx). Any new scope must be its own narrow allow entry — never widen this https rule.
